visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with dark hair and a goatee, wearing a dark suit jacket. The background is dark and indistinct, with a cool, blueish light illuminating him from the side. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The audio opens with a low, ambient, and slightly tense musical score that creates a mood of suspense and seriousness. He holds a white cigarette to his lips, and a plume of smoke drifts across his face. He has a serious, contemplative expression as he looks slightly off-camera. The camera remains steady, capturing the intimate and somber mood of the scene. The man lowers the cigarette, his gaze still fixed and intense. He brings his hand, which has a ring on the ring finger, closer to his face, still holding the cigarette near his mouth. The smoke continues to swirl around him. The shot remains a tight close-up, emphasizing his focused and slightly weary demeanor. The camera angle shifts slightly, showing more of the man's hand as he brings the cigarette away from his mouth. The smoke dissipates, revealing more of his face and the dark, moody lighting. The "风行网" text is still present in the corner
